description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the chef/chefdk:latest Docker image and setting CHEF_LICENSE to accept. Define three stages: Lint, Test, and Smoke Test. In the Lint stage add a Cookstyle job that runs `cookstyle cookbooks/`, a Foodcritic job that runs `foodcritic cookbooks/`, a Foodcritic Deprecations job that runs `foodcritic cookbooks/ -t deprecated -t chef13 -t chef14 -t chef15`, and a Rubocop job that runs `rubocop utils/`. In the Test stage add a Berks job that runs `apt-get -qq update`, `apt-get -qq install git -y`, `rm -rf Berksfile.lock`, `berks install`, `berks verify`, and `berks outdated`; add a ChefSpec job that runs `chef gem install docker-api --version '= 1.34.0'` and then for each cookbook directory executes `chef exec rspec --force-color -fd`; and add a New_Berks job that runs `apt-get -qq update`, `apt-get -qq install git -y`, and for each cookbook directory runs `berks install`, `berks verify`, and `berks outdated`. In the Smoke Test stage add a .BoK Dry Run job that loops over `applications/*.y*l` files and for each executes `mu-deploy -d $bok` with echo messages. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
